sys_script.description: // 2.8.3HF | 2023-09-22 | DFCT0012170 - DIA - Tasks not getting created when using "Select to Create Multiple Subtasks" with 10 or more subtask primary assignee // RJ - STRY0063652- added this script to create the multiple sub templates. If there is a parent, we will do the coding after insert. If it is a child, we need to do some processing before insert and after insert. This is the after insert Method
sys_script.name: Template Task- A-Insert-NewSub-MultiSubs
